channel.title: Benchmark PS Blog
channel.description: Practical insights on physiotherapy outcomes, MSK measurement, and evidence-based practice.

item.title: Why Physiotherapy Clinics That Measure Outcomes Retain More Patients (and Charge More)
item.description: Data shows clinics using outcome measurement see 25% higher retention and command premium fees. Learn why measurement drives patient loyalty and revenue.

item.title: The Business Case for Outcome Measurement in Physiotherapy Clinics
item.description: Why outcome measurement isn't just good clinical practice—it's essential for sustainable physiotherapy business growth. Evidence-based insights for practice owners.

item.title: How to Implement Objective Physiotherapy Assessment Without Expensive Equipment
item.description: Learn how to implement objective physiotherapy assessment using validated, low-cost tools instead of expensive equipment. Evidence-based strategies for UK practices.

item.title: MSK Outcome Benchmarks: What Good Conservative Care Actually Looks Like
item.description: Evidence-based MSK outcome benchmarks for physiotherapy. What objective measures reveal about effective conservative care and clinical decision-making.

item.title: Evidence-Based Progression in Physiotherapy: A Framework for Time-Pressured Clinicians
item.description: Evidence-based progression frameworks for time-pressured physiotherapists. Practical guidelines from stroke, low back pain, and exercise medicine research.

item.title: Why 43% of Physiotherapy Care Is Non-Recommended — and What Clinics Can Do About It
item.description: Evidence reveals significant gaps in physiotherapy adherence to clinical guidelines. Learn what drives non-recommended care and proven strategies to improve outcomes.

item.title: Staffing Mix and Physiotherapy Margins: How Standardised Care Reduces Senior Clinician Dependency
item.description: How standardised physiotherapy protocols reduce dependency on senior clinicians, improve staffing efficiency, and maintain quality outcomes while controlling costs.

item.title: ACL Return-to-Sport Testing: Which Criteria Actually Predict Re-Injury Risk
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of ACL return-to-sport testing criteria that actually predict re-injury risk. Which tests matter and which don't for safe return decisions.

item.title: The State of Technology in Physiotherapy: What Works, What Doesn't, and What's Coming
item.description: Evidence-based review of physiotherapy technology: digital delivery shows promise, robotics faces barriers, and objective measurement remains underused.

item.title: The Economic Case for Better MSK Conservative Care
item.description: The economic case for better MSK conservative care: how standardised assessment and objective measurement can reduce healthcare costs and improve patient outcomes.

item.title: Knee Osteoarthritis and Conservative Care: Setting Realistic Expectations With Objective Data
item.description: Evidence-based guide to managing knee osteoarthritis expectations through objective measurement and conservative treatment planning.
